MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS UNOPPOSED. PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. IN THE ANSWER, DEFENDANT "ADMITS THAT ALL OF THE STATEMENTS OF THE COMPLAINT ARE CORRECT." NO OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION WAS FILED. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE A MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND SEEK TO ENTER JUDGMENT IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE; THE COURT WILL NOT AWARD COSTS AS PART OF THIS MOTION. (PRINCIPAL - $3934.24) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JANUARY 18, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 19, 2012 AT 4 PM, OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jan-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was unopposed. PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is granted without leave to amend. In the answer, defendant "admits that all of the statements of the Complaint are correct." No opposition to the motion was filed. Plaintiff shall file a memorandum of costs and seek to enter judgment in accordance with the Code of Civil Procedure; the Court will not award costs as part of this motion. (Principal - $3934.24) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Dec-19-2012 Continued To Jan-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued on the court's own motion to January 18, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than December 19, 2012 at 4 pm, or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077.
